description: Full suggested run order for one detector day. Starts with coarse placement/orientation checks and then probes intra-ASIC quadrant, column-region, and row behavior.

patterns.label: anchor asic0
patterns.purpose: Establish coarse placement for the first module anchor.
notes: Good opening test to confirm module-level placement before finer probing.

patterns.label: anchor asic4
patterns.purpose: Establish coarse placement for the second module anchor.

patterns.label: anchor asic8
patterns.purpose: Establish coarse placement for the third module anchor.

patterns.label: anchor asic12
patterns.purpose: Establish coarse placement for the fourth module anchor.

patterns.label: module0 asic0 orientation
patterns.purpose: Probe orientation of ASIC 0 inside one module.
notes: Tests whether the top ASICs are rotated relative to the bottom ASICs.

patterns.label: module0 asic1 orientation
patterns.purpose: Probe orientation of ASIC 1 inside one module.

patterns.label: module0 asic2 orientation
patterns.purpose: Probe orientation of ASIC 2 inside one module.

patterns.label: module0 asic3 orientation
patterns.purpose: Probe orientation of ASIC 3 inside one module.

patterns.label: single-asic quadrant TL
patterns.purpose: Probe top-left quadrant in isolation.
notes: Most direct check of the suspected intra-ASIC top-half transform.

patterns.label: single-asic quadrant TR
patterns.purpose: Probe top-right quadrant in isolation.

patterns.label: single-asic quadrant BL
patterns.purpose: Probe bottom-left quadrant in isolation.

patterns.label: single-asic quadrant BR
patterns.purpose: Probe bottom-right quadrant in isolation.

patterns.label: single-asic column region C0
patterns.purpose: Probe first 48-column region in isolation.
notes: Designed to determine whether all four regions are independently addressable.

patterns.label: single-asic column region C1
patterns.purpose: Probe second 48-column region in isolation.

patterns.label: single-asic column region C2
patterns.purpose: Probe third 48-column region in isolation.

patterns.label: single-asic column region C3
patterns.purpose: Probe fourth 48-column region in isolation.

patterns.label: single-asic row region R0
patterns.purpose: Probe first row band in isolation.
notes: Useful after column-region and quadrant results are understood.

patterns.label: single-asic row region R1
patterns.purpose: Probe second row band in isolation.

patterns.label: single-asic row region R2
patterns.purpose: Probe third row band in isolation.

patterns.label: single-asic row region R3
patterns.purpose: Probe fourth row band in isolation.
